settings.code:
<style>

@media only screen and (min-width: 992px) {
.hero__content p {
  width: 25vw;
}
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 3000px) {

.wrapper--full {
max-width: 3000px;}
}
.hero__content h1 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 40px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: #fbfbfb;
  padding: 0px 0px;
}
.hero__content p {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: 400;
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: rgba(251, 251, 251, 0.8);
  padding: 0px 0px;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
</style>
<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    // Select the color selector fieldset
    const colorFieldset = document.querySelector(".radio__fieldset--swatches");
    if (!colorFieldset) return;

    // Find all visible radio swatches inside it
    const swatches = colorFieldset.querySelectorAll("radio-swatch");

    // If 0 or 1 swatches, hide the color selector fieldset
    if (swatches.length <= 1) {
      colorFieldset.style.display = "none";
    }
  });
</script>


<style>

@media only screen and (max-width: 749px) {
    .grid--mobile-slider {
        padding-left: 20px;
    }
    .grid--mobile-slider .grid-item {
        margin-right: 0px;
    }

}

.collection__products .grid-outer
 {
    padding: 10px 10px;
}

    .grid {
        gap: 5px;
    }

    .collection__products .product-item__info {
        padding-left: 0px;
    }
.custom-rating .star {
margin-top:-4px;
font-size: 14px !important;
margin-right: 2px !important;
}

.product-item--centered .product-information {
    text-align: left;
}
.product-information p {
padding-top:3px;
}
.product-information p, .product-information span{
	text-transform: uppercase !important;
	font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  	font-weightA: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  	font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    	letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
	font-size: 12px; 
    	line-height: 1;
    	margin: .0em 0;
    	text-transform: var(--FONT-UPPERCASE-HEADING, none);
	align-items: center;
	font-size: 12px; 
font-weight: 100;
}

.sub {
	font-size: 10px !important;
	text-transform: uppercase;
	color:grey;
padding-bottom:3px;
}
</style><style>

@media (min-width: 763px) and (max-width: 3000px) {
.hero__content p {
  width: 25vw;
}
.wrapper--full, .hero__content, .wrapper--full-padded, .grid-outer, .grid__items-holder {
max-width: 90vw;
min-width: 90vw;
margin: 0 auto;
}


.index-hero .wrapper--full, .hero__video {
max-width: 100vw !important;
min-width: 100vw !important;
}

.index-hero {
padding-top: 0vh;
}

.grid-outer {
padding:0;
}
.frame__item{
height: 90vh;
}
}



.collection__products, .grid__items-holder {
padding-left:5vw;
padding-right:5vw;
}
.wrapper--full-padded {
padding:0;
}

}

max-width: 3000px !important;

}

}
}

section_rich_text_aqn9LE.name: Rich text

settings.code:
Our tees are designed with a standard fit—comfortable without being too loose or too tight. For a relaxed, oversized look, size up. For a more fitted style, choose your true size.

Our hoodies are built for everyday wear with soft, mid-weight fabrics that balance comfort and durability. They’re versatile enough to layer for colder weather or wear solo year-round.

We use premium cotton blends for softness and breathability, often mixed with polyester for shape retention and durability. Each piece is designed to feel good on day one and hold up after repeated washes.

For the longest life, wash cold with like colors and tumble dry low or hang dry. Avoid ironing directly over prints or graphics. With the right care, your gear stays looking fresh for years.

All tops are true-to-size based on chest measurement. If you’re between sizes, size up for a looser feel. Orders ship within 5 business days and usually arrive in 3–4 business days. Returns are accepted within 30 days on unworn items with original tags/packaging.
{{ collection.description }}
